title: Bardovi
overview: Anant is a middle aged hearse-driver who brings corpses to the crematorium. He has little liking for the usual day to day routine and prefers to live along. He is and always has been fascinated by death. One day, Anant finds out his dead mother was part of a mysterious organization. He sets out to discover if everything he knew about his mother was a lie.
